title: Agentbase | Serverless Agent Platform for Developers
full_text:
November 2025
Nov 10
Agentbase intro video launched
Released our intro video showcasing Agentbase platform capabilities and developer experience.
Nov 8
Agent chat interface launched
Added interactive chat interface to test and interact with your individual agents directly in the platform.
October 2025
Oct 12
Agents API enhanced with workflows, schedules, and callback queries
Major Agents API update introducing powerful new capabilities for building complex AI workflows and automation.
Workflows
AI-native workflow system with dynamic step execution and dependency management.
Schedules
Run agents on cron schedules, specific dates, or time intervals.
Callback Configuration
Webhook endpoints for real-time agent message events and status updates.
Background Processing
Asynchronous agent execution for long-running tasks.
Final Output Configuration
Structured response processing with JSON schema validation.
Step Schema Validation
Advanced step configuration with retry policies and output validation.
Oct 3
Added datastore and documents
Create datastores to organize your documents or databases. Upload and index documents to datastores.
September 2025
Sep 30
TypeScript SDK updated
Enhanced TypeScript SDK with improved developer experience and additional functionality. Better type definitions, simplified API calls, and enhanced error handling.
Sep 29
✨ Documentation refresh
Complete rewrite of our documentation for improved clarity and developer experience. Added support for copying entire pages as context for agents, searching through documentation using your favorite AI chat, notable updates on QuickStart, pricing clarity including cost tracking, event types, more information on reusable persistent computers, session ID utilization, and support links to the community.
Sep 24
Python SDK released
Official Python SDK launched for seamless integration with Agentbase platform. Includes full API coverage, type hints support, async/await compatibility, and comprehensive examples.
Sep 13
Added API Reference for Agent execution
New API documentation for running agents with customizable parameters, mode configurations, system prompts setup, and rules and constraints.
Sep 11
Added npm create command
Launch new projects instantly with 'npm create agentbase@latest'. Includes quick project scaffolding, pre-configured templates, and zero-config setup.
Sep 1
Pointer → Agentbase announcement
Announced the rebrand and platform evolution with a new focus on serverless agents, enhanced developer experience, and streamlined platform approach.
Sep 1
Changelog launched
Introducing our changelog to track product updates, monitor new features, and stay informed on improvements.
